specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services and have built a solid reputation among boat owners who need reliable, knowledgeable help they can count on.

Our team handles everything from detailed boat surveying and inspection — whether you're buying, selling, or just want to know the true condition of your hull and systems — to diving and underwater services that keep your running gear clean and your bottom in shape without hauling out. We also specialize in marine AC and climate control systems, keeping your cabin comfortable through the heat, and marine plumbing and sanitation work that keeps everything below the waterline functioning the way it should.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding coastal communities, working on everything from day boats to liveaboards. At Ben's Boatworks, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat every job with that in mind. Whether you're docked in Annapolis or we're coming to you within our 60-mile service area, our goal is straightforward: get the work done right, explain what we found, and make sure you leave with confidence in your vessel.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call for a quote today.
seoKeywords: boat plumbing and sanitation South Florida

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers the hull, deck, mechanical systems, and safety equipment to give you a clear, documented picture of your vessel's condition. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, an insurance survey, or a condition-and-value report, we walk through every accessible area and deliver a detailed written assessment. It's the kind of information that protects your investment and helps you make informed decisions.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater services allow us to inspect, clean, and address issues below the waterline without the time and expense of a full haul-out. We handle hull cleaning, prop and shaft inspections, zinc replacement, and underwater damage assessments. Keeping your running gear and bottom in good shape directly affects your boat's performance and fuel efficiency.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems require specialized knowledge of refrigerant handling, raw water cooling circuits, and the electrical demands unique to a vessel's environment. We diagnose and repair existing systems, perform seasonal maintenance, and can evaluate your setup when something isn't keeping up. A properly functioning climate control system makes a real difference on hot days aboard.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work covers everything from through-hull fittings and seacocks to holding tanks, head systems, and freshwater plumbing. We troubleshoot leaks, replace aging components, and make sure your sanitation system meets current regulations. Reliable plumbing is one of those things you don't think about until it fails — we help make sure it doesn't.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey to assess hull and systems condition
Insurance inspection with full written condition-and-value report
Underwater hull cleaning and running gear inspection without haul-out
Zinc anode replacement and prop shaft inspection by dive
Marine AC system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal maintenance
Holding tank and marine head system repair or replacement
Through-hull fitting and seacock inspection and replacement
